name: BountyEscrow

methods.name: create_bounty
methods.desc:
Create a new bounty with locked ALGO reward.
Atomic group: Payment(→ app_address) + ApplicationCall(create_bounty).

methods.name: opt_in
methods.desc: Initialize local state for a user (freelancers/voters).

methods.name: submit_proof
methods.desc:
Submit work proof. work_hash = SHA256(mega_nz_link + key).
mega_link_hash = SHA256(mega_nz_link).

methods.name: approve_payout
methods.desc: Creator approves work → ALGO payout via InnerTransaction.

methods.name: reject_submission
methods.desc:
Creator rejects a submission. Decrements submissions_remaining.
remaining > 0: resets worker to NONE (allows resubmission). remaining == 0: sets EXPIRED status.

methods.name: initiate_dispute
methods.desc: Freelancer raises dispute after all rejections exhausted. DAO Court 48hr.

methods.name: resolve_dao_dispute
methods.desc:
Permissionless after dao_deadline.
freelancer votes > creator → pay freelancer. tie or creator wins → refund creator.

methods.name: refund_expired
methods.desc: Permissionless refund if deadline passed and bounty OPEN/IN_PROGRESS.

methods.name: cancel_bounty
methods.desc: Creator cancels bounty before any submissions.

methods.name: get_bounty_info
methods.desc: Get full bounty state — used by frontend.

methods.name: get_voter_status
methods.desc: Get a voter's DAO vote status.

desc:
ARC4-compliant Bounty Escrow Smart Contract — v3.3

    The contract App Account IS the escrow.
    ALGO flows:
      Creator → App Account (via grouped Payment + create_bounty)
      App Account → Freelancer (approve_payout or resolve_dao_dispute freelancer win)
      App Account → Creator (reject all, let_go_bounty, dao tie/creator win,
                              refund_expired, cancel_bounty)

sourceInfo.errorMessage: Deadline must be at least 1 hour from now
Only rejected freelancer can let go
